title: Smoky Chewy Mediterranean Lamb Skewers
description: These lamb skewers are infused with smoky paprika, green chili heat, and citrus zest, then slow‑cooked to tender, chewy perfection—ideal for a flavorful Mediterranean solo dinner.

ingredients.name: lamb shoulder
ingredients.notes: trimmed and cubed into 2 cm pieces

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium–high heat.
In a bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, mint, green chili, lemon juice, sumac, salt, and pepper.
Toss the lamb cubes in the spice mixture until well coated; let marinate for 15 minutes at room temperature.
Thread lamb cubes onto skewers, spacing them evenly.
Grill the skewers for 10–12 minutes, turning every 2–3 minutes, until the lamb is cooked through and slightly charred on the edges.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes to allow juices to redistribute.
Serve immediately, optionally garnished with extra mint or lemon wedges.
Enjoy the smoky, chewy flavors of this Mediterranean lamb skewer feast.
